.status-bar.background: color(srgb 0.960784 0.960784 0.960784 / 0.35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(239, 239, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(239, 239, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(239, 239, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(239, 239, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(199, 156, 138, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(239, 239, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(239, 239, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
